title: Find My Device - Playing sound from 2 different devices
scenario: "Find My Device" tone fails with error on second headset when two headsets are paired and connected in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
Pair and connect Headset A to the app.
Pair and connect Headset B to the app (both headsets should be connected simultaneously).
Navigate to the Device Settings screen for Headset A.
Tap 'Find My Device' and play a tone on Headset A — verify the tone plays successfully.
Return to the Home screen and navigate to the Device Settings screen for Headset B.
Tap 'Find My Device' and attempt to play a tone on Headset B.
expected: A tone plays on Headset B.
